description: Updated whimsical Roman sandals have never looked this good. These colour pop sandals from catwalk are versatile enough to go with everything: from jeans to shorts to skirts. UpperCriss cross thong style straps across the forefoot and midfoot with a rubber toe separatorStitch detailing on the strapsTextured footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with a short heelTextured pattern on the forefoot and heel for better gripSandal careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
